sections.paragraph:
ἀφανίζω [ἀφανής] ‘cause to be in a condition not subject to appearance’

—a. hide from view (like actors with masks) Mt 6:16.

—b. from the idea of being hidden from view it is a short step to ‘destroy’ and related ideas consume, ruin Mt 6:19f; pass. with act. force disappear, perish Ac 13:41; in wordplay (cp. Mt 6:16) of those who appear and then disappear, perish Js 4:14.
